bird.name: 格氏鹃鵙
bird.summary: 格氏鹃鵙（学名：Coracina graueri）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种。分布于刚果民主共和国和乌干达。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润山地。该物种受栖息地破坏威胁。 参考文献 BirdLife International.

locations.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
locations.summary: The Albertine Rift montane forests (French: Forêts montagnardes du Rift Albertin) is a tropical moist broadleaf forest…

relations.subject: 格氏鹃鵙
relations.evidence: It is found in mid-elevation montane forests, where it can be locally common

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 格氏鹃鵙
relations.evidence: It is potentially threatened by climate change, and it has not been recently reported from some areas where it was previously known. Other threats include deforestation
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
